name: Roasted Chicken (Emeril)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small bowl, combine the sun-dried tomato paste, minced garlic, olive oil, black pepper, salt, chopped basil, and chopped parsley.
3. Rub the mixture all over the insides and outsides of the chickens.
4. Roast the chickens in the preheated oven for 40 minutes.
5. Allow the roasted chicken to cool for 30 minutes.
6. Transfer the cooled chicken to the refrigerator to cool completely, which may take about 2 hours.
